title: schollera oxycoccos
intro: Schollera oxycoccos, also known as bearberry, is a small, evergreen shrub native to the Arctic regions of North America and Europe. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic and having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Schollera oxycoccos include the prevention and treatment of urinary tract infections, as well as the reduction of inflammation and improvement of overall kidney function. Schollera oxycoccos is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
